name: Core Rules Source Audit

ENGAGEMENT_RANGE_IN.meaning: Distance used by the assistant for Engagement Range checks.
ENGAGEMENT_RANGE_IN.source_status: Encoded constant; verify against the current Core Rules PDF whenever the official downloads page changes.

MODEL_COHERENCY_IN.meaning: Practical coherency distance used by generated model markers.
MODEL_COHERENCY_IN.source_status: Assistant approximation; verify exact coherency clauses for unit size/model count.

HIDDEN_VISIBILITY_IN.meaning: Distance used for Hidden/dense-terrain visibility reminders.
HIDDEN_VISIBILITY_IN.source_status: Assistant approximation based on imported terrain tags and unit actions.

COVER_HIT_MODIFIER.value: +1 to required hit roll in assistant maths
COVER_HIT_MODIFIER.meaning: The app shows cover as a hit-roll/BS modifier in its quick calculation.
COVER_HIT_MODIFIER.source_status: High-risk assumption; the UI now labels it as assistant-default unless a user-supplied rules pack overrides it.

notes: This file documents which rules assumptions need checking against the latest official PDFs.
The app scans the official downloads page for update-date drift, but it does not download or redistribute official rules text.
